summary: Completed comprehensive testing of HabitRPG gamified habit tracker app (Iteration 4). All 29 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified all major features including glassmorphism design, 5-tab navigation, Shop system, Streak card, XP pop animation, and token persistence.

issues: Emergent badge at bottom overlaps mobile nav - requires force click. This is a known platform limitation.

passed_tests: API health check
Levels endpoint (10 levels from Rookie to Apex)
Admin login (Game Mode) - admin@habitrpg.com
Test user login (Focus Mode) - test@habitrpg.com
Invalid credentials rejection
Wrong password rejection
New user registration with 50 starting gems and 1 streak revive
Onboarding flow - all 5 questions save correctly
Onboarding completion sets onboarding_completed=true
Get current user (/auth/me)
User stats endpoint
Mode switching (Focus <-> Game)
Habit creation with XP values (easy=10, medium=25, hard=50)
Get all habits
Get today's habits
Habit difficulty XP values verified
Complete habit - earns XP and gems
Uncomplete habit - deducts XP
Delete habit
Gem earning by difficulty (easy=5, medium=10, hard=20)
Shop items endpoint - Streak Shield (100 gems, max 4) and 2x XP Boost (150 gems, max 3)
Buy Streak Shield
Buy 2x XP Boost
Not enough gems error handling
Game status (gems, streak revives, shields, xp boost uses)
Level rewards endpoint
Roast endpoint
Daily progress tracking
Weekly progress tracking
Bearer token authentication
Token refresh
Cleanup test habits
UI: Landing page loads with glassmorphism design
UI: Login page loads correctly
UI: Admin login redirects to dashboard
UI: Dashboard shows greeting without emoji (SVG icons only)
UI: Level badge displays (Level 4 - Achiever)
UI: XP progress bar with transition
UI: Streak card (Duolingo-style) with streak count and motivational message
UI: Game Mode shows gems counter (122)
UI: Game Mode shows shield counter (1)
UI: Game Mode shows 2x Boost indicator (1)
UI: 5-tab navigation (Home, Progress, Level, Shop, Settings)
UI: Shop page displays Streak Shield and 2x XP Boost with prices
UI: Shop shows 'Not enough gems' state correctly
UI: Level page with glassmorphic roadmap and SVG icons
UI: Level page shows game rewards per level
UI: Progress page with charts and stats
UI: Progress page Daily/Weekly tabs working
UI: Settings page with profile, stats, mode switch
UI: Add habit dialog with name, difficulty, time of day
UI: Habit completion works with XP and gem earning
UI: Token persistence - stays on dashboard after page refresh
UI: Mobile navigation - all 5 tabs accessible
UI: Focus Mode - minimal UI without game elements (no gems, shields, boost)
UI: Signup form with validation
UI: Signup redirects to onboarding
seed_data_creation: Admin and test users are seeded on backend startup via seed_admin() function
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from iteration 4 are working correctly. Key verifications: 1) Bearer token auth with localStorage persistence working, 2) 5-tab navigation (Home, Progress, Level, Shop, Settings) working on both desktop and mobile, 3) Shop system with Streak Shield (100 gems, max 4) and 2x XP Boost (150 gems, max 3) working, 4) Gem earning: easy=5, medium=10, hard=20 gems per habit completion, 5) Streak card (Duolingo-style) with motivational messages working, 6) XP pop animation on habit completion working, 7) Glassmorphism design applied to all pages, 8) No emojis - all SVG icons (Lucide), 9) Focus Mode shows minimal UI without game elements, 10) Signup -> Onboarding -> Dashboard flow working (no redirect loop).

auth.bearer_token: Working - tokens stored in localStorage and sent via Authorization header
auth.token_persistence: Working - stays logged in after page refresh

navigation.5_tabs: Home, Progress, Level, Shop, Settings - all working
navigation.mobile_bottom_nav: Working - floating pill above Emergent badge

game_mode.xp_pop_animation: Working - floating XP pop on habit completion

focus_mode.minimal_ui: Working - no gems, shields, boost indicators
focus_mode.clean_design: Working - zinc/gray styling instead of purple

habits.create: Working with name, difficulty, time of day

glassmorphism.all_pages: Applied to Home, Progress, Level, Shop, Settings
glassmorphism.moderate_glow: Applied - not full glow as per user preference
